meta.title: Personal Resume
meta.description: A resume site created with the Readymade theme.

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $attachments = get_posts( array(    'post_type'   => 'attachment',    'numberposts' => 1,    'post_status' => 'inherit',    's'           => 'rm-nappyco-dazyah', ) ); if ( ! empty( $attachments ) ) { $attachment_id = $attachments[0]->ID; set_theme_mod( 'custom_logo', $attachment_id ); }
